message:
fix(codegen): Migrate return_stmt.zig to builder API

Migrated all 20 emit + 5 genExpr calls to ZigBuilder API:
- Early returns (defer/finally blocks) → builder with flush
- Finally blocks section → captureExpr + emitValue
- NotImplemented handling → builder
- Tail-recursive calls → captureExpr loop for args
- Magic method conversion → captureExpr + emitValue
- PyValue boxing → captureExpr + emitValue
- Single flush at end

Pattern used:
- const b = try self.getBuilder()
- Capture expressions: const val = try self.captureExpr(node)
- Emit values: try b.emitValue(val, .{})
- Flush once: b.getBody() → self.output.appendSlice()
- Special case: emitAllFinallyBlocks() writes directly to self.output
  (flush before, create new builder after)

Tests: unary 13/13, longexp 1/1 ✅

Progress: 7/47 statement files migrated
